why.keep_all: ratified keep-all under the cull policy (aircraft + bad/blurry out, satellites stay): frame QA found NO z>3.5 defect-side outliers (361/361 registered, FWHM 3.47-3.90 median 3.65 ~5.9% spread, roundness 0.60-0.72), and the anomaly audit found NO aircraft and NO unknowns.
why.satellites_kept: DSC_7866, DSC_7871 - single-frame satellite trails; a moving minority trail stacks clean through rej 3 3 (dead-end registry); user-ratified 'satellites stay'.
why.session_edges_kept: DSC_7578 (first) and DSC_7938 (last) are QA-clean and not anomaly-flagged - no session-edge cull.
why.weight_null: wFWHM weighting at this set's ~5.9% FWHM spread is worse than none (min-max ramp soft-culls the worst frame at any spread).
